meaning: n.(英国细木工)谢拉顿家具式样adj.谢拉顿风格的,谢拉顿式的
examples: What do you know about Sheraton Hotel?
Arabs at the Corniche with Sheraton Hotel behind.
Do you believe you will fit in at the Sheraton Hotel?
Formed venture with ITT Sheraton to manage and develop hotels in Germany, Switzerland and Spain.
There will also be new hotels from Raffles, Conrad, Hilton, Sheraton, Swissotel and St Regis.
